affectedLayers: UIKit browser shell, chrome, tabs, homepage, library/settings, Gecko feature bridges, accessibility, localization, and performance evidence
owners: BrowserViewController composition plus focused UI/feature owners; Gecko, SessionManager, TabManager, and stores remain authoritative
invariants: No WebKit, SwiftUI, second tab/store owner, permanent dual UI, or loss of recovery access
compatBoundary: iOS 16 UIKit and Gecko; preserve existing user data and regular/private tab behavior
nonGoals: IPA packaging, CloudKit, Via/Firefox asset copying, or persistence rewrites
